rawMetadata: {"compiler":{"version":"0.8.33+commit.64118f21"},"language":"Solidity","output":{"abi":[{"inputs":[],"name":"IS_SCRIPT","outputs":[{"internalType":"bool","name":"","type":"bool"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"run","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"kind":"dev","methods":{},"title":"DeployGovernance","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"Foundry deploy script for the Agent Council governance stack.  Deploys:   1. CouncilToken \u2014 mints to 4 agents   2. CouncilTimelock \u2014 1 day delay, Governor as proposer, open executor   3. CouncilGovernor \u2014 wired to token + timelock  Post-deploy:   - Grants PROPOSER_ROLE and CANCELLER_ROLE to the Governor on the Timelock.   - Revokes deployer's TIMELOCK_ADMIN_ROLE so timelock is self-governed.  Usage:   forge script script/DeployGovernance.s.sol --broadcast --rpc-url <RPC>  Set env vars:   AGENT_1, AGENT_2, AGENT_3, AGENT_4  \u2014 council agent addresses   DEPLOYER_PRIVATE_KEY                 \u2014 deployer private
